design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience Fighting Game through its core fighting loop.

gdd_outline.combat_notes: Combat pacing should match genre tempo and readable threat language.
constraints: Failure model: Round loss resets health; match loss ends set
Signature mechanics must reinforce genre fantasy
gdd_outline.core_loop: Win rounds by depleting opponent health through combos, special moves, and reads; first to take the set wins the match.
gdd_outline.overview: Fighting games center on one-on-one duels where players read telegraphs, execute combos, and manage super resources within round timers.
gdd_outline.progression_notes: Follow signature mechanic dependencies across early, mid, and late phases.

mechanics.expression: Best-of rounds with discrete health pools per round.
mechanics.map_notes: Best-of rounds with discrete health pools per round.

mechanics.expression: Link attacks into escalating combo routes.
mechanics.map_notes: Link attacks into escalating combo routes.

mechanics.expression: Directional or button sequences unlock special attacks.
mechanics.map_notes: Directional or button sequences unlock special attacks.

mechanics.expression: Punish unsafe moves during recovery frames.
mechanics.map_notes: Punish unsafe moves during recovery frames.

mechanics.expression: Meter builds toward super or EX moves.
mechanics.map_notes: Meter builds toward super or EX moves.

mechanics.expression: Startup and recovery frames telegraph risk.
mechanics.map_notes: Startup and recovery frames telegraph risk.

mechanics.expression: Arcade mode stage progression between rivals.
mechanics.map_notes: Arcade mode stage progression between rivals.

narrative.core_loop: Win rounds by depleting opponent health through combos, special moves, and reads; first to take the set wins the match.
narrative.description: Fighting games center on one-on-one duels where players read telegraphs, execute combos, and manage super resources within round timers.

pacing.early: Teach round based health duel with low failure cost.
pacing.late: Test full signature loop mastery under peak constraints.
pacing.mid: Combine supporting mechanics and raise resource or pattern pressure.

variables.expression: Meter for supers and ex moves.

variants.label: Platform Fighter
variants.notes: Smash-style ring-outs and stage hazards layered on duel structure.
